title: Credit Card Unauthorized Charges
text: I was charged unauthorized fees on my credit card without my consent. I never signed up for these services and the bank refuses to reverse the charges despite multiple calls. I want an immediate refund of $350 in unauthorized fees applied to my account over the last two months.

title: Mortgage Payment Error
text: My mortgage payment was incorrectly processed last month. The bank applied the payment to the wrong loan account and is now reporting a late payment on my credit report. This has damaged my credit score and I have been trying to get this corrected for weeks without success.

title: Incorrect Credit Report Entries
text: I have multiple incorrect entries on my credit report from accounts I never opened. I have disputed these inaccurate items several times but the credit bureau keeps verifying them as correct without investigating properly. These false derogatory marks are preventing me from getting a loan.

title: Debt Collection Harassment
text: A debt collection agency has been calling me multiple times a day regarding a debt that I do not owe. They are contacting me at inappropriate hours including early morning and late at night. They also contacted my employer which is embarrassing and may violate debt collection laws.

title: Student Loan Servicing Issues
text: My student loan servicer is not applying my payments correctly. I have been making on-time payments every month but they keep reporting missed payments to the credit bureaus. My loan balance is not decreasing properly despite making more than the minimum required payment.

title: Auto Loan Hidden Fees
text: I applied for an auto loan and was approved at a specific interest rate but the dealer added hidden fees and changed the interest rate after I signed the contract. The total cost of the loan is now significantly higher than what was disclosed during the application process.
